name: Split Calculator
description: Royalty split calculator for music collaborators with percentage allocation, role tagging, preset splits, and validation that totals equal 100%.

standard.description: Full split calculator with collaborator rows, percentage inputs with sliders, role tags, total validation, and preset buttons for common splits

simple.description: Two-party simplified split with just percentage inputs and names, suitable for quick agreements between duo collaborators

advanced.description: Advanced variant with role-specific sub-splits, writer vs publisher breakdown, and master vs publishing separation for complex rights arrangements

visual_brief: A vertical list of collaborator rows inside a rounded card. Each collaborator row has a drag handle on the far left (6-dot grip icon, visible on hover), a 40px circular avatar with initials fallback, a name text in semibold 14px with role tag beneath as a small colored pill (Producer=purple, Songwriter=blue, Performer=amber, Engineer=gray), and on the right a percentage input combining a horizontal slider (flex-grow, 0-100%) with a coupled numeric spinbox (60px wide) showing the exact percentage with % suffix. A visible remove-row X button appears on hover at far right. Below the rows sits a total badge showing the sum of all percentages (e.g. '100.0%') as a prominent pill: green background if exactly 100%, red background with warning icon if over or under. Preset buttons row below the total shows common allocations ('50/50', '70/30', 'Equal shares', 'Custom') as outlined buttons that apply instantly. Add-collaborator button at bottom spans full width as a dashed-border outlined button with plus icon.

slots.split-row: Repeating row (d-interactive) per collaborator with drag handle, avatar, name+role, percentage input, and remove button.
slots.drag-handle: 6-dot grip icon at far left, visible on hover. Enables drag-reorder of rows.
slots.collaborator-avatar: 40px circular avatar with profile image or initials fallback on colored background.
slots.name-and-role: Stack showing collaborator name in semibold and role tag pill beneath with category-specific color.
slots.role-tag: Small colored pill displaying role (Producer/Songwriter/Performer/Engineer). Category-coded colors.
slots.percentage-input: Compound input combining horizontal slider (0-100) and numeric spinbox (0.0-100.0 with % suffix). Coupled bidirectionally.
slots.remove-button: X icon button at far right, visible on row hover, removes that collaborator row.
slots.total-badge: Prominent pill showing sum of all percentages. Green if = 100%, red with warning icon if not.
slots.preset-buttons: Horizontal row of quick-apply preset buttons (50/50, 70/30, Equal, Custom).
slots.add-row-button: Full-width dashed-border button at bottom with plus icon to add new collaborator.

responsive.mobile: Rows wrap: avatar + name on top, slider + spinbox on bottom. Remove button moves next to drag handle. Preset buttons scroll horizontally.
responsive.tablet: Standard layout with slightly condensed spacing.
responsive.desktop: Full inline layout with all controls and hover states visible.

micro.slider-drag: slider fill follows pointer at 60fps with spinbox number update
micro.total-change: total badge color transitions 200ms ease-out when crossing 100%

transitions.row-add: scale-in + fade 250ms spring at bottom of list
transitions.preset-apply: all percentages animate simultaneously to new values 400ms ease-out

ambient.invalid-total-pulse: total badge red pulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite when sum ≠ 100%

keyboard: Arrow keys: adjust focused percentage by 1%
